knowledgeBase.content: 26 contract provisions cataloged. Reference summary: program-management fees, indemnity clauses, payment terms, allocation policies, host-employer obligations, candidate replacement terms. Full clause text on file. Reference only — operational status (active orders, current allocation) lives on the J1 System Dashboard.
26 contract provisions cataloged. Reference summary identical structure to AAG. Full clause text on file. Reference only.
26 contract provisions cataloged. Reference summary identical structure. Full clause text on file. Reference only.
Tier structure by program type (WAT vs. Trainee vs. Intern), source country, and host market. Margin targets confidential — agents must NEVER quote a margin number without checking with Robert first.
knowledgeBase.confidentialityNote: Pricing tier values to remain in private storage; only category labels exposed in this panel.

knowledgeBase.content: Active source countries: Brazil, China, Thailand, Indonesia, Mexico, South Africa, Uzbekistan. Each has country-specific sponsor approval, embassy interview wait times, fraud-flag history, and recruiter network. Agents MUST verify country-specific requirements before quoting a candidate timeline.

Standard DS-2019 lifecycle: sponsor application → vetting → DS-2019 issuance → SEVIS fee → embassy interview → arrival. Typical 8–14 weeks depending on source country. NEVER guarantee a timeline to a partner or host employer — flag any timeline question to Robert.
knowledgeBase.complianceFlag: Per the J-1 video voiceover compliance standard (Robert 2026-05-06): no approval guarantees, no coaching to hide facts, DS-2019 placeholders only, training-only disclaimer.

knowledgeBase.content: Miami J-1 housing requirements: sponsor-approved housing only, occupancy limits per local code, distance-from-worksite rules. Operational housing matching lives on the J1 Housing Finder. This panel is policy reference only.
knowledgeBase.partitionNote: Operational housing data lives on j1-housing-finder-index.html — do not mirror here.

knowledgeBase.content: Per-market sponsor housing rules vary. Each new market entry requires sponsor approval workflow before agent quotes feasibility.

Hard flags: indemnity-clause modifications without legal review, payment-term variances from master agreement, allocation holds (sponsor freezes new placements), host-employer SEVIS noncompliance. Any flag → halt + escalate to Robert.

Operational order status and candidate pipeline data lives on j1-system-dashboard.html. This Skills agent does NOT cache that data. To read live pipeline: use Jarvis tool read_remote_dashboard({dashboard:'j1-system'}).
knowledgeBase.partitionNote: Pointer-only entry. No operational data stored here.

rules.if: Amendment touches indemnity, payment, or allocation terms

rules.then: Draft response, queue for Robert sign-off
Halt all placements with that host — flag to Robert + sponsor liaison
Escalate to GHR J-1 Director within 24h; preserve evidence
Halt — sponsor pre-approval + risk review required

escalationRules.action: Refuse — per video compliance standard, NO approval guarantees
